workContext.summary: Brian Mauck is Head of Capital Markets at Jeeves Financial Technology, running capital markets and credit data science. Work spans lender negotiations, analytics, ML, and structured credit. Key tools: Taktile, Redshift, Metabase, python-pptx, loc_tape, Linear, DeerFlow, LangGraph.

personalContext.summary: Direct, zero tolerance for hallucination or unrequested work. Requires AI to inspect actual data before writing queries. Payment amounts in loc_tape are negative; use WHERE payment_amount_usd < 0 and -SUM(). Always provide clickable Drive links. Output in Google Docs/Sheets.

recentMonths.summary: Active lender negotiations across NB, CIM, Gramercy, BBVA, Francisco Partners, and Vista Credit. BBVA: $14MM SBLC in diligence; personal docs for Dileep Thazhmon requested by Daniel Alejandro Bernal; Brandon/Andres/Jorge asked to send directly to BBVA; 7 open commercial items flagged; W&C + Goodwin confirmed no CIM conflict. CIM 5th Amendment: Hayes Hyde (Goodwin litigator) engaged; Section 7b dispute and 5% prepayment fee active. CBIZ audit close-out blocked on GL reconciliations for three accounts. April 2026 SOFOM charge-offs confirmed at 4 companies, $62,507 USD.

longTermBackground.summary: Brian Mauck is Head of Capital Markets at Jeeves Financial Technology, running capital markets and credit data science. Key stakeholders include Alexander Melikian (CFO/direct manager), Brandon McGathy (GC), Andres Leal, Jorge Hurrle, Kacper Chrobot (new hire), and Hayes Hyde (Goodwin litigator). Enforces strict standards: zero tolerance for fabrication, unrequested work, or over-explaining. Never include counterparty names in externally shared file names.
